name: Danny Elfman
abstract: Daniel Robert Elfman (born May 29, 1953) is an American film composer, singer, songwriter, and musician. He came to prominence as the lead vocalist and primary songwriter for the new wave band Oingo Boingo in the early 1980s.

about_quotes.speaker: Jonathan Scales
about_quotes.evidence: I don't know Danny Elfman you know. Clearly he’s huge, but I’m like, “Oh Danny Elfman.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Jonathan Scales interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 23, 2025
